products.name: FD-596-4
products.descriptor: 96 cu. ft. temperature-only environmental test chamber for large-scale UAV component testing

evidence.snippet:
AES engineered the [FD-596-4](/products/FD-596) Temperature Only Environmental Test Chamber , a high-performance floor model system built to meet the unique demands of the application.
*   **Expansive Workspace Volume:** This chamber features a generous 96 cu. ft. internal workspace, providing the necessary scale for testing larger autonomous assemblies without the footprint of a full walk-in room.

products.name: FD-527-7.5-SAFE
products.descriptor: 27 cu ft floor-model EUCAR Level 7 battery safety test chamber, temperature-only, for eVTOL and high-current cycling

evidence.snippet: To address the demanding requirements of high-performance battery testing for the EVTOL industry, they adopted AES's newest addition to our [All Test Platform series,](/batteryfixtures) the ATPHEAVY Cassette, which was fully integrated into our [FD-527-7.5-SAFE](/products/FD-527-7.5-SAFE) chamber.

*   **Advanced Safety and Containment:**This [battery test chamber](/battery-test-chambers) creates a secure, controlled environment for cycling cells under extreme conditions. Its design includes advanced temperature limited sheath heaters, airflow management, and containment features that meet EUCAR Level 7 safety standards, providing prevention and mitigation features in the event of thermal runaway.

products.name: ATPHEAVY Cassette
products.descriptor: 600 A per channel removable cassette battery test fixture for All Test Platform series

evidence.snippet: To address the demanding requirements of high-performance battery testing for the EVTOL industry, they adopted AES's newest addition to our [All Test Platform series,](/batteryfixtures) the ATPHEAVY Cassette, which was fully integrated into our [FD-527-7.5-SAFE](/products/FD-527-7.5-SAFE) chamber.

*   **High-Current Testing Capability:** ATPHEAVY Cassette supports **600 amps per channel,** enabling the simultaneous high-current cycling essential for evaluating EVTOL battery performance under realistic operating conditions.

products.descriptor: Patented battery test fixture for environmental chambers, All Test Platform series

evidence.snippet: Battery innovation is relentless, so your testing has to keep pace. AES’s ATPPRIME and ATPHEAVY battery testing fixtures deliver the safety, performance, and speed today’s research demands.

products.name: FDR-501
products.descriptor: RF-shielded temperature test chamber for interference-free wireless device testing, 1.15 cu. ft.

evidence.snippet:
### FDR-501
#### Floor
**FDR-501** is a **radio frequency (RF) shielding test chamber engineered for controlled testing of frequency-generating devices in interference-free environments**. Designed for compact lab applications, it isolates internal signals while preventing external RF interference, ensuring accurate and repeatable device validation.

products.name: AESONE CONNECT®
products.descriptor: Browser-based remote monitoring and control software for AES environmental test chambers

evidence.snippet:
AESONE CONNECT®
---------------

products.name: FUSION-24-016-3200
products.descriptor: Integrated dual-chamber battery test system, 200–400 A/channel, up to 16 channels, 3200 A total, with MACCOR cycler

evidence.snippet:
High-capacity dual-chamber system for maximum throughput.
*   200-400A per channel, scalable to 16 channels
*   Two 12 cu-ft SC-512-4-SAFE chambers for large-format testing
*   Energy-efficient design with 90% return-to-grid
*   Ideal for EV packs, aerospace modules, and stationary energy storage

products.name: FUSION-12-008-1600
products.descriptor: Integrated single-chamber battery test system, 200–400 A/channel, up to 8 channels, 1600 A total, with MACCOR cycler

evidence.snippet:
Single-chamber design optimized for high-power testing.
*   200-400A per channel, scalable to 8 channels
*   12 cu-ft SC-512-4-SAFE chamber for for large-format testing
*   Energy-efficient design with 90% return-to-grid
*   Well-suited for pilot lines and automotive module validation

products.name: FUSION-08-192-0192
products.descriptor: Integrated ultra-dense battery test system, 192 channels at 1 A each, for high-volume cell testing, with MACCOR cycler

evidence.snippet:
Ultra-dense channel system for high-volume cell testing.
*   192 channels at 1A max current each
*   Four current ranges down to 5µA resolution
*   Fast response time under 100µs for precision cycling
*   Designed for consumer cells, wearables, and electronics R&D

products.name: FUSION-08-064-0960
products.descriptor: Integrated mid-range battery test system, 64 channels at 15 A each, for small-cell to compact module testing, with MACCOR cycler

evidence.snippet:
Flexible mid-range system with versatile current control.
*   64 channels at 15A max current each
*   Four current ranges down to 30µA resolution
*   Sub-100µs rise time for accurate measurements
*   Covers both small-cell testing and compact module work

unresolved_questions: ATPPRIME and ATPFLEX fixture series are named in the battery fixtures filter (resource-0003 line 83) but no individual fixture listings for these series were visible in the fetched page (only ATPHEAVY fixtures appear in the first 10 of 37 results). Descriptor detail is minimal.
FDR-505 is referenced as a similar product to FDR-501 on the FDR-501 product page (resource-0004 lines 147-150) but its dedicated product page was not fetched — full specs not confirmed.
The products index (resource-0006) shows 108 chamber SKUs total; only the first 10 are visible. Many SC, SD, LH, FD, HD, and other series SKUs exist but were not fetched.
AESONE CONNECT® classified under ground_segment as remote-monitoring/control software; test_and_measurement could also apply given its exclusive use with test chambers.

No explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance language was found for any individual product. FUSION products show a 'made and supported in the USA' claim (resource-0002 line 143), recorded as not_disclosed; all others lack even that signal and are unknown.

fetch_requests.reason: FDR-505 referenced as FDR-Series RF-shielded chamber (5.09 cu. ft.) on the FDR-501 page but dedicated product page was not fetched; needed to confirm full specs and readiness.
ATPPRIME Pack Mini fixture referenced in batteryfixtures listing but page not fetched; would confirm ATPPRIME series product detail.
AESONE CONNECT® technology page not fetched; would provide fuller product spec, NDAA/compliance language, and pricing signals.
